rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a minor issue with conceptual reconstruction as it could benefit from clearer framing of the theoretical contribution.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact has an argument-chain issue, specifically in the recursive feasibility proof which relies on a quadratic Lyapunov function without fully explaining its construction and implications.
